title: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-SFP28-SR, 25 Gbps, Multi Mode, 100m
description: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-SFP28-SR is an optical 2-fiber Multi Mode module type SFP28 with a speed of 25 Gbps and 2x LC connectors with upc polishing. The wavelength of the module Tx and Rx is 850nm and Tx power is allows range up to 100m
